problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: If Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
